expectations.evidence: Produces 7 events: 4 duty-period events + 3 separate layover events

expectations.text: Each title uses the format 'E3405 · HHMM ORG → HHMM DEST' with → arrow
expectations.evidence: Titles use 'E3405 Day 1 — MSP-GFK-MSP-ABR (Duty)' format — different separator, different structure, no HHMM times

expectations.text: Day 1 notes: 'Day 1 of 4', report 1215, release 2142, RON Fairfield Inn Aberdeen
expectations.evidence: 'Day 1 of 4' present but report/release shown with colons ('12:15') not HHMM format, hotel info in a separate layover event not notes

expectations.text: Day 4 notes: 'Day 4 of 4', no RON line (last day of trip)
expectations.evidence: Day 4 notes: 'Day 4 of 4' and 'Trip ends at MSP (home base). No layover.' — correctly omits RON

expectations.text: All flight numbers prefixed with DL (DL4330, DL4264, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Flight numbers shown without prefix as 'Flt 1: MSP→GFK' — no DL prefix

expectations.text: Times shown in HHMM format (no colons), e.g. 1215 not 12:15
expectations.evidence: Times shown with colons: 'Dep 13:00 Arr 14:21', '12:15' etc.
